headline: MARKET WRAP — May 22
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — May 22, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Semiconductors drove risk appetite while crypto flows turned sharply negative, highlighting institutional rotation from speculative positioning. Defensive sectors gained ground late as growth momentum showed signs of fatigue. Tomorrow's setup hinges on whether tech breadth expands or defensive rotation accelerates.
